---
name: Concept critique
about: Critique a concept definition, boundary, risk, or ambiguity
title: "[Concept critique] "
labels: concept-critique
assignees: ""
---

## Concept

Name the concept being critiqued.

## Concern

What is the issue?

- Circular definition
- Over-metaphorization
- Lack of operational clarity
- Overlap with existing theory
- Missing boundary condition
- Value risk
- Other

## Argument

Explain the critique as clearly as possible.

## Suggested revision

If possible, propose a sharper definition, boundary, or counter-formulation.

## Related files

Mention files or sections if relevant.
